app.name: Forward
app.description: Application dependency evidence and modeled network assurance

scopes.name: storage:buckets:read
scopes.comment: Read Grail buckets containing approved dependency evidence

scopes.name: storage:events:read
scopes.comment: Query approved Dynatrace dependency events from Grail

scopes.name: storage:spans:read
scopes.comment: Query current instrumented application dependency spans from Grail

scopes.name: environment-api:entities:read
scopes.comment: Read Dynatrace service/entity context before synchronizing Forward intent checks

scopes.name: app-settings:objects:read
scopes.comment: Read the selected tenant-managed Forward API connection in app functions

actions.name: sync-forward-intent-checks
actions.title: Synchronize Forward intent checks
actions.description: Plan or apply Forward intent-check creates and updates by direct API through a tenant-managed connection. Read Only and Network Operator connections are plan-only; Network Admin apply requires exact approval.

actions.name: run-forward-nqe-evidence
actions.title: Run Forward NQE evidence
actions.description: Execute an approved Forward Library NQE under Read Only or a reviewed arbitrary NQE under Network Operator or Network Admin through the tenant-managed app connection.
